title: Delay
text: Delay The time in milliseconds between the user clicking a button and the start of the auto-repeat. Default is 500 milliseconds (half a second). Delay = Milliseconds Usage Dynamic? Yes Supported in Grid? No Dependencies: None Description To start auto-repeat immediately, specify zero (0). Applies To uspinbutton (SpinButton) Related Links Repeat Repeat interval for auto-repeat behavior, in milliseconds. The default is 250 (four repetitions per second). Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
